diagrams.title: Hypervisor Architecture Types
diagrams.description: Comparison of Type 1 (bare metal) and Type 2 (hosted) hypervisor architectures showing how they interface with hardware and VMs
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental architecture differences and performance implications for capacity planning

diagrams.title: Virtualization Resource Model
diagrams.description: Shows how physical resources (CPU, Memory, Storage) are virtualized and allocated to multiple VMs through the hypervisor
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how physical resources are abstracted and shared among virtual machines

diagrams.title: Live Migration Process
diagrams.description: Depicts the process of moving a running VM from one physical host to another without downtime
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how live migration works for capacity balancing and maintenance
